---
title: "Evans_Version"
format: html
Author: Evan Whitfield (For this file)
---

```{r}
library(httr)
response <- GET("https://newsapi.org/v2/everything?q=Iran&from=2026-05-22&language=en&pageSize=50&apiKey=173ec253cb06408abbf28061323e5fb4")

str(response, max.level = 1)
```

```{r}
library(jsonlite)
parsed_response <- fromJSON(rawToChar(response$content))
parsed_response
```
